_comment: Dead-man heartbeat for the 15-min options-automation cron (HARD RULE 8). Stamped once per trading day by the first automation run of that day. No stamp today = the automation is dead; open a session to re-arm.
note: Options automation run (routine-triggered, market open Tue 09:32 ET). EXITS: get_option_positions showed 3 open positions -- ACHR 2028-01-21 5C (LEAP, entry $2.47, mark ~$2.63, +6.5%, distinct risk profile per 2026-07-20 note, not gated by mechanical TP/stop), RBRK 2026-08-21 90C (entry $2.90, mark ~$2.20, -24%, no exit trigger: not at -50%, not at +50-100%, DTE 31>14, next earnings 2026-09-08 far out), and WULF 2026-08-21 21C (entry $1.30, mark oscillating $2.00-2.13 intraday i.e. +54-64%) -- WULF crossed into the mandatory +50-100% take-profit band, no manual_hold_override present, so sold-to-close 1 contract via marketable limit at $1.90 (filled 13:32:59Z, +$60/+46.2% realized after spread) per HARD RULE 8 mechanical TP exit. holdings.json updated to remove the WULF position. ENTRIES: skipped -- both latest_morning.md (2026-07-20 15:14 UTC) and latest_intraday.md (2026-07-20 19:03 UTC) are stale (no fresh report yet today), so no new technical signal to gate an entry against; also options sleeve (ACHR+RBRK, ~$537 mark) sits near/at the 15% cap on the post-WULF-sale account, leaving no comfortable room. Realized options P&L today: +$60 (WULF close), daily loss cap (-$150) not applicable/not hit. No new or unresolved _flag entries in holdings.json this run (grep confirmed none).
